metadata.disclaimer: Architectural estimate only. This embedded calculator uses editable heuristic assumptions and does not represent official Palo Alto Networks pricing, licensing, or final sizing guidance.

logging.recommendation: Short retention suits lightweight operations or downstream SIEM-led monitoring.
Thirty-day retention is a practical enterprise baseline for operations and investigations.
Longer retention usually signals stronger compliance or SOC workflow expectations.
Twelve-month retention is typically associated with audit-heavy environments and long-running investigation needs.

scoreBands.mobileGuidance: A single-region estimate is often enough for early-stage or focused user deployments.
scoreBands.networkGuidance: Group sites into compact onboarding waves and validate large site outliers separately.
scoreBands.ztnaGuidance: Start with a minimal redundant connector set and confirm segmentation assumptions.
scoreBands.serviceGuidance: Keep service connections aligned to core production paths.

scoreBands.mobileGuidance: Distribute users across at least two regions and validate peak authentication bursts.
scoreBands.networkGuidance: Separate standard and high-throughput sites for cleaner resilience planning.
scoreBands.ztnaGuidance: Run redundant connectors per region with spare capacity for maintenance events.
scoreBands.serviceGuidance: Map service connections to production and recovery environments.

scoreBands.mobileGuidance: Model user affinity and failover load at a regional level rather than as one aggregate.
scoreBands.networkGuidance: Use regional onboarding zones and isolate high-bandwidth branches for review.
scoreBands.ztnaGuidance: Plan multi-region connector pools with explicit spare capacity.
scoreBands.serviceGuidance: Distribute service connections across hybrid estates and validate east-west dependencies.

scoreBands.mobileGuidance: Treat mobility, resilience, and traffic localization as separate global workstreams.
scoreBands.networkGuidance: Break the deployment into regional programs and model concentration risk explicitly.
scoreBands.ztnaGuidance: Plan connector pools per region with operational ownership and staged failover testing.
scoreBands.serviceGuidance: Align service connections to global cloud and datacenter topology, including recovery patterns.
